join_order.build: num(uom=pure AND value IS NOT NULL) GROUP BY (adsh_code, tag_code) -> max_value
join_order.probe: num(uom=pure AND value IS NOT NULL)
join_order.notes: Two-pass over num. Pass 1: parallel morsel-driven scan, thread-local open-addressing hash maps keyed on uint64 packed key ((uint64_t)(uint32_t)adsh_code << 32) | (uint32_t)tag_code, value=double max_value. Cap=262144=next_pow2(80000*2), slot=16B, 4MB per thread. After Pass 1, merge 64 thread-local maps into single shared read-only max_map. Pass 2: parallel scan probes merged max_map, checks n.value == max_map[key] (exact double equality). Per C9/P23: sized on filtered group count 80000, not raw table size.

join_order.build: sub via pre-built sub_adsh_hash mmap index
join_order.probe: num candidates passing max_map equality check
join_order.notes: Use pre-built sub_adsh_hash.bin (P11, zero build cost). Probe n.adsh_code -> sub_row_id via hash_int32 and linear probe. Then check sub_fy[sub_row_id] == 2022 (s.fy filter, ~19.6% selectivity on sub -> ~16882 qualifying). Collect (value, adsh_code, tag_code, name_code) into thread-local candidate vectors.

filters.notes: Applied in both Pass 1 and Pass 2. Load uom_dict.txt at runtime to resolve pure_code (C2).
Applied after sub_adsh_hash probe using sub_fy column. INT32_MIN is null sentinel for fy.

data_structures.max_map_thread_local: open_addressing_hash_map per thread: key=uint64_t packed (adsh_code<<32|tag_code), value=double max_value, sentinel_key=UINT64_MAX, cap=262144, slot=16B (8B key + 8B value), total=4MB/thread. Initialize with mmap(MAP_ANONYMOUS)+omp parallel for to distribute page faults across cores (P22, C20: never memset for non-zero sentinels).
data_structures.max_map_global: single merged open_addressing_hash_map after Pass 1 merge, same layout as thread-local, cap=262144, read-only in Pass 2
data_structures.sub_adsh_hash: pre_built_mmap_index: sf3.gendb/sub/indexes/sub_adsh_hash.bin, cap=262144, slot=SubADSHSlot{int32_t adsh_code, int32_t row_id, int32_t _pad0, int32_t _pad1}=16B, empty sentinel adsh_code==INT32_MIN
data_structures.candidates: thread_local std::vector<struct{double value; int32_t adsh_code; int32_t tag_code; int32_t name_code;}>, merged across threads before top-100 selection

parallelism.pass1_scan: parallel over num row morsels; each thread maintains its own max_map; no synchronization during scan
parallelism.pass1_merge: sequential merge of 64 thread-local max_maps into global max_map: scan each thread-local map's 262144 slots, update global map with max(existing, candidate) for non-sentinel slots
parallelism.pass2_scan: parallel over num row morsels; shared read-only global max_map (no synchronization); thread-local candidate vectors
parallelism.candidate_merge: merge thread-local candidate vectors; expected small total (<10K); apply std::partial_sort for top-100 (P6)

indexes.purpose: join_lookup: n.adsh_code -> sub.row_id for fy filter and name retrieval. Declare sub_cap, sub_mask, sub_ht at function scope before any scan loop (C32).

aggregation: hash_group_by with uint64-packed composite key (adsh_code<<32|tag_code), MAX(double value) accumulation. No C29 concern: output is individual double values, not SUM aggregation.

hash_probe_pattern.bounded_probing: for (uint32_t p = 0; p < cap; p++) { slot = (start + p) & mask; ... } — C24 mandatory
hash_probe_pattern.sub_adsh_hash_probe: uint32_t pos = (uint32_t)(hash_int32(n_adsh_code) & sub_mask); bounded probe; check adsh_code match; get row_id; check sub_fy[row_id]==2022

output.sort_strategy: std::partial_sort on merged candidate vector (P6: O(n log k)), tiebreakers name+tag for deterministic output (C33)

encoding.name: printf("\"%s\"", name_dict[name_code].c_str()) — C31: always double-quote, company names may contain commas

output.dict_loading: load name_dict from sf3.gendb/sub/name_dict.txt; load tag_dict from sf3.gendb/shared/tag_dict.txt; load uom_dict from sf3.gendb/num/uom_dict.txt for pure_code resolution (C2)

correctness_checklist: C2: load uom_dict.txt at runtime; resolve pure_code by string comparison; never hardcode
C9: max_map cap = next_pow2(80000*2) = 262144, based on filtered group cardinality (P23)
C20: use parallel mmap+fill for sentinel initialization; never memset for multi-byte non-zero sentinels
C24: ALL hash table probes (max_map + sub_adsh_hash) use bounded for-loop with probe < cap
C29: no SUM — MAX(double) is safe; direct double equality for n.value == max_value is correct
C31: double-quote name and tag in all CSV output rows
C32: declare sub_cap, sub_mask, sub_ht at run_query() function scope before scan loops
C33: tiebreakers ORDER BY name ASC, tag ASC after value DESC for deterministic top-100
